Notice Of And Motion For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation Of The Parties
Off Calendar Dec-05-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'s Motion For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation Of The Parties.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion for entry of judgment pursuant to stipulation of the parties" is granted.

A proposed order and proposed judgment is lodged with the papers for the court's review and signature.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr. , Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)
